'''âf-v-w-t''' ('''kafavwetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ringmaster|ringmaster]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ringmaster|ringmaster]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-v-w-t
|-
! Lemma
| kafavwetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifavwetoko|thifavwetoko]] || [[word:jifavwetoko|jifavwetoko]] || [[word:shifavwetoko|shifavwetoko]] || [[word:kifavwetoko|kifavwetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufavwetoko|thuthufavwetoko]] || [[word:jujufavwetoko|jujufavwetoko]] || [[word:shushufavwetoko|shushufavwetoko]] || [[word:kukufavwetoko|kukufavwetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufavwetoko|thufavwetoko]] || [[word:jufavwetoko|jufavwetoko]] || [[word:shufavwetoko|shufavwetoko]] || [[word:kufavwetoko|kufavwetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofavwetoko|thofavwetoko]] || [[word:jofavwetoko|jofavwetoko]] || [[word:shofavwetoko|shofavwetoko]] || [[word:kofavwetoko|kofavwetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofavwetoko|thofavwetoko]] || [[word:jofavwetoko|jofavwetoko]] || [[word:shofavwetoko|shofavwetoko]] || [[word:kofavwetoko|kofavwetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfavwetoko|thĂŠfavwetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfavwetoko|jĂŠfavwetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfavwetoko|shĂŠfavwetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfavwetoko|kĂŠfavwetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafavwetoko|thafavwetoko]] || [[word:jafavwetoko|jafavwetoko]] || [[word:shafavwetoko|shafavwetoko]] || [[word:kafavwetoko|kafavwetoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
